seoTitle: Paget vs Palgrave — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Paget and Palgrave. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Paget and Palgrave.
heading: Paget vs Palgrave — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Paget, Queensland and Palgrave, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Palgrave has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Paget (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Paget or Palgrave safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Paget has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Palgrave scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Paget scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Palgrave scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Paget or Palgrave?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Palgrave has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
